title: Model Offloading & Memory Management
offloading_flags: offload_network: bool — offload main generation network after inference
offload_tokenizer: bool — offload tokenizer after decoding
offload_text_encoder_model: bool — offload T5 text encoder after embedding
offload_guardrail_models: bool — offload text+video guardrails after safety check
disable_guardrail: bool — skip all guardrail loading entirely
init_conditional_loading: if NOT offload_text_encoder_model OR disable_prompt_encoder → _load_text_encoder_model() at init
if NOT disable_guardrail AND NOT offload_guardrail_models → _load_text_guardrail() (if has_text_input) + _load_video_guardrail() at init
_load_model() always called at init (loads model config/skeleton)

_offload_network(): if self.model.model exists: del self.model.model → self.model.model = None
_offload_tokenizer(): if self.model.tokenizer exists: del self.model.tokenizer → self.model.tokenizer = None

lazy_load_unload_patterns: _run_model_with_offload(...): [if offload_network → _load_network()] → [if offload_tokenizer → _load_tokenizer()] → _run_model(...) → [if offload_network → _offload_network()] → [if offload_tokenizer → _load_tokenizer() (reload for decoding)] → _run_tokenizer_decoding(sample) → [if offload_tokenizer → _offload_tokenizer()]
generate_activity_flow: NO → _run_guardrail_on_prompt_with_offload(prompt) → DECISION: is_safe? → NO → log critical, return None (END)
DECISION: disable_guardrail? → NO → _run_guardrail_on_prompt_with_offload(enhanced_prompt) → DECISION: is_safe? → NO → return None (END)
NO → _run_guardrail_on_video_with_offload(video) → DECISION: video safe? → NO → return None (END)
_run_model_with_offload_activity: DECISION: offload_network? → YES → _offload_network() [del model.model, gc, cuda.empty_cache]
DECISION: offload_tokenizer? → YES → _load_tokenizer() (reload for decoding step)
DECISION: offload_tokenizer? → YES → _offload_tokenizer() [del model.tokenizer, gc, cuda.empty_cache]

subclass_overrides.AutoRegressivePipeline._run_model_with_o: calls _run_model() then offloads network+tokenizer; no tokenizer reload mid-method (different pattern from diffusion)

key_notes: Pattern: load-on-demand → use → unload, with gc.collect() + torch.cuda.empty_cache() after every offload
Offloading is opt-in per component; all 4 components can be independently controlled
If offload=False for a component, it stays resident in GPU for the full pipeline duration
DiffusionT2WPipeline has an extra _offload_prompt_upsampler_model() following the same del/gc/empty_cache pattern
AutoRegressivePipeline adds _offload_diffusion_decoder() for an optional diffusion decoding stage
BaseWorldGenerationPipeline is ABC; _run_model(), _run_model_with_offload(), _run_tokenizer_decoding(), generate() are all pass/abstract in base
T5 text encoder: CosmosT5TextEncoder (real) or DummyT5TextEncoder (if disable_prompt_encoder)
